swahili.nba_average_free_throw_percentage_is_7: Wastani wa asilimia ya mirusho ya bure NBA ni ~77%
swahili.nba_average_3_point_percentage_is_36: Wastani wa asilimia ya pointi-tatu NBA ni ~36%
swahili.soccer_penalty_kick_conversion_rate_is: Kiwango cha ufanisi wa mateke ya penalti katika soka ni ~76%
swahili.mlb_average_batting_average_is_250_hit: Wastani wa kupiga MLB ni ~.250 (hiti 1 kati ya 4)
swahili.nfl_field_goal_success_rate_is_84: Kiwango cha mafanikio ya magoli ya uwanjani NFL ni ~84%
swahili.pro_tennis_first_serve_success_rate_is: Kiwango cha mafanikio ya huduma za kwanza katika tenisi ya kitaalamu ni ~62%
swahili.nhl_average_shooting_percentage_is_10: Wastani wa asilimia ya kupiga NHL ni ~10%
swahili.explore_probability_through_experiment: Chunguza uwezekano kupitia majaribio. Endesha majaribio na uone masafa yaliyozingatiwa yakikaribia maadili yanayotarajiwa.
swahili.p_h_p_t_0_5_law_of_large_numbers_as_tr: P(H) = P(T) = 0.5. Sheria ya idadi kubwa: kadiri majaribio yanavyoongezeka, uwiano wa kichwa unakaribia 0.5. Baada ya kurusha mara 1,000 utakuwa ndani ya ~3% ya 50%, lakini katika mfululizo wowote mfupi chochote kinawezekana.
swahili.dice_uniform_1_n_each_d4_d6_d8_d10_d12: Dadu — kila moja sawa 1/N (d4 / d6 / d8 / d10 / d12 / d20)
swahili.pick_any_die_size_each_face_equally_li: Chagua ukubwa wowote wa dadu. Kila uso unawezekana sawa: P = 1/N. Hisabati ni sawa katika aina zote za dadu — kinachobadilika ni denominator. d4 ni 1/4, d20 ni 1/20.
swahili.two_dice_sum_the_triangular_distributi: Jumla ya dadu mbili — usambazaji wa pembetatu
swahili.roll_two_dice_of_the_chosen_type_and_a: Rusha dadu mbili za aina iliyochaguliwa na ujumlishe. Jumla sasa si sawa: jumla za katikati ni za kawaida zaidi. Kwa 2d6, P(7)=6/36, P(2)=1/36. Ndiyo maana katika Monopoly watu hutua mara nyingi zaidi kwenye mali za rangi ya machungwa — baada ya kutoka gerezani, 6, 7, 8 ni jumla za kawaida zaidi.
swahili.equal_area_sectors_equal_probability_u: Sekta za eneo sawa = uwezekano sawa. Sekta zisizo sawa → uchotaji wenye uzito. Vizungushaji ni njia laini zaidi kwa wanafunzi wa msingi kuelekea usambazaji tofautitofauti.
swahili.sports_weighted_real_world_odds: Michezo — uwezekano wenye uzito wa ulimwengu halisi
swahili.free_throw_75_nba_3_point_36_mlb_hit_2: Mrusho wa bure 75%, pointi-tatu NBA 36%, hiti MLB ~25%. Uwezekano si mara zote 50/50 — hisabati inashughulikia uzito usio sawa kwa njia ileile, ila kwa denominator tofauti.
swahili.marble_bag_with_vs_without_replacement: Mfuko wa marumaru — kwa dhidi ya bila kurudisha
swahili.with_replacement_independent_draws_wit: Kwa kurudisha: uchotaji huru. Bila: uwezekano hubadilika kwa kila uchotaji — uwezekano wa masharti. Utaratibu kamili nyuma ya usambazaji wa hipajiometriki na uwezekano wa michezo ya karata.
swahili.custom_design_your_own_outcome_set: Maalum — buni seti yako mwenyewe ya matokeo
swahili.build_any_discrete_distribution_test_t: Jenga usambazaji wowote tofautitofauti. Jaribu sheria ya idadi kubwa kwa uwezekano usio sawa, onyesha kuwa kwa majaribio ya kutosha uigaji unaweza kujibu swali lolote la fomu funge. Monte Carlo ndogo.
swahili.multiply_along_branches_add_across_lea: Zidisha kando ya matawi; jumlisha kati ya majani. Kurusha sarafu mbili: HH HT TH TT kila moja 0.25. Michoro ya mti hupanuka hadi matatizo ya kiwango cha msingi cha vipimo vya matibabu na nadharia ya Bayes.
swahili.pi_monte_carlo_estimation: Pi — makadirio ya Monte Carlo π
swahili.throw_darts_at_a_unit_square_count_how: Rusha dati kwenye mraba wa kipimo; hesabu ni ngapi zinazoanguka ndani ya robo duara iliyoandikwa. π ≈ 4 × (ndani / jumla). Ukaribiaji ni O(1/√N) — kila tarakimu hugharimu dati 100× zaidi.
swahili.in_a_room_of_23_the_probability_of_a_s: Katika chumba cha watu 23, uwezekano wa siku ya kuzaliwa inayoshirikiwa ni > 50%. Kwa 70 ni > 99.9%. Kinyume na hisia kwa sababu tunahesabu ulinganisho (2 kati ya 23 = 253), si watu. Mfano wa kupinga ulio wazi zaidi darasani kwa uwezekano wa kihisia.
swahili.without_replacement_each_marble_drawn_: 💡 Bila kurudisha: kila marumaru iliyochotwa huondolewa kwenye mfuko. Uwezekano hubadilika baada ya kila uchotaji! Mfuko hujaa tena ukiwa tupu.
swahili.keyframes_mbshake_0_100_transform_rota: @keyframes mbShake { 0%,100% { transform: rotate(0deg); } 15% { transform: rotate(-8deg); } 30% { transform: rotate(8deg); } 45% { transform: rotate(-5deg); } 60% { transform: rotate(5deg); } 75% { transform: rotate(-2deg); } }
swahili.define_each_event_as_a_fraction_e_g_1_: 🎯 Fafanua kila tukio kama sehemu — k.m., "mara 1 kati ya 20"
swahili.add_colored_marbles_to_a_bag_probabili: 🎱 Ongeza marumaru za rangi kwenye mfuko. Uwezekano = idadi ya marumaru zako ÷ jumla ya marumaru.
swahili.drag_sliders_to_set_exact_probability_: 🎨 Vuta vitelezi kuweka asilimia kamili ya uwezekano kwa kila matokeo.
swahili.behind_one_door_a_prize_behind_two_goa: Nyuma ya mlango mmoja: zawadi. Nyuma ya miwili: mbuzi. Chagua mlango, mwenyeji hufungua mlango wenye mbuzi, kisha unachagua: kaa au badilisha?
swahili.last_20_manual_stay_plays_green_wins_d: Michezo 20 ya mwisho ya "kaa" ya mkono — kijani hushinda, nyekundu nzito hupoteza
swahili.last_20_manual_switch_plays_green_wins: Michezo 20 ya mwisho ya "badilisha" ya mkono — kijani hushinda, nyekundu nzito hupoteza
swahili.outcome_strips_show_your_last_20_manua: Vipande vya matokeo huonyesha michezo yako 20 ya mwisho ya mkono — kijani = ushindi, nyekundu = hasara. Mfululizo unaoonekana hukuambia jinsi nasibu inavyohisi kweli.
swahili.math_says_stay_wins_1_3_33_switch_wins: Hisabati husema: kaa hushinda ≈ 1/3 (33%). Badilisha hushinda ≈ 2/3 (67%). Kwa majaribio ya kutosha, hisabati hushinda.
swahili.drop_balls_through_a_peg_grid_each_peg: Angusha mipira kupitia gridi ya vigingi. Kila kigingi hupotosha 50/50 kushoto au kulia. Baada ya mipira ya kutosha, histogramu inakuwa mkunjo wa kengele — nadharia kuu ya kikomo ikitenda.
swahili.gold_dashed_line_theoretical_normal_cu: ⬆ Mstari wa dhahabu wa vistari: mkunjo wa kawaida wa kinadharia. Kwa uangushaji zaidi vipande vyako vya kimajaribio vinapaswa kushikamana zaidi nayo.
swahili.in_a_room_of_just_23_people_there_s_a_: Katika chumba cha watu 23 tu, kuna > 50% nafasi kwamba wawili wanashiriki siku ya kuzaliwa. Vuta kitelezi kuchunguza!
swahili.re_randomize_all_birthdays: Rudia nasibu siku zote za kuzaliwa
swahili.run_100_simulations_of_this_room_size: Endesha miigo 100 ya ukubwa huu wa chumba
swahili.each_has_a_random_birthday_same_color_: Kila 🧑 ana siku ya kuzaliwa ya nasibu. Rangi sawa + mwanga = jozi inayolingana. Sampuli tena kuona ni mara ngapi mlinganisho huonekana.
swahili.two_event_compound_probability_tree: 🌳 Mti wa Uwezekano Mchanganyiko wa Matukio-Mawili
swahili.multiply_the_two_probabilities_to_get_: 💡 Zidisha uwezekano wote wawili kupata uwezekano wa pamoja. Matukio haya ni huru, kwa hivyo P(A∩B) = P(A) × P(B).
swahili.streaks_are_normal_random_texture: Mfululizo ni muundo wa kawaida wa nasibu
swahili.theoretical_vs_observed_comparison: 📊 Ulinganisho wa Kinadharia dhidi ya Uliozingatiwa
swahili.as_you_run_more_trials_the_observed_ba: 💡 Unapoendesha majaribio zaidi, vipande vilivyozingatiwa vinapaswa kukaribia kinadharia — hii ndiyo sheria ya idadi kubwa ikitenda!
swahili.monte_carlo_scatter_plot: 🥧 Mchoro wa Mtawanyiko wa Monte Carlo π
swahili.10k_points_needed_for_2_decimal_places: Pointi ~10k zinahitajika kwa nafasi 2 za desimali za π
swahili.60_dice_rolls_all_within_10_of_expecte: Kurusha dadu 60+, zote ndani ya 10% ya inavyotarajiwa
swahili.1000_coin_trials_with_max_deviation_3: Majaribio 1000 ya sarafu yenye mkengeuko wa juu < 3%
swahili.1000_monte_carlo_pi_trials_error_0_05: Majaribio 1000+ ya Monte Carlo pi, hitilafu < 0.05
swahili.set_n_23_in_birthday_mode_to_see_the_p: Weka n=23 katika hali ya siku ya kuzaliwa kuona kitendawili
swahili.all_outcomes_nearly_equal_in_probabili: Matokeo yote karibu sawa katika uwezekano.
swahili.middle_outcome_dominates_approaches_no: Matokeo ya katikati hutawala. Kwa ndoo zaidi hukaribia umbo la kawaida.
swahili.one_tail_much_heavier_than_the_other_a: Mkia mmoja mzito zaidi kuliko mwingine. Usambazaji usio na ulinganifu.
swahili.two_outcomes_share_roughly_equal_proba: Matokeo mawili hushiriki uwezekano takriban sawa, ya tatu ni kidogo sana au zaidi.
swahili.three_sliders_set_the_relative_probabi: Vitelezi vitatu huweka uwezekano linganishi wa matokeo ya chini / kati / juu. Umbo la usambazaji huainishwa katika moja ya maumbo manne tofautitofauti. Hakuna alama, hakuna ufunuo — telezesha na utambue.
swahili.hypothesis_free_text_what_combination_: Dhana (maandishi huru): mchanganyiko gani hutoa sawa? Na kilele?
swahili.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_one_watch: Shika vitelezi viwili thabiti. Sogeza kimoja. Tazama umbo.
swahili.find_two_settings_that_produce_the_sam: Pata mipangilio miwili inayotoa umbo lilelile.
swahili.what_raw_weights_produce_a_peaked_shap: Uzito gani ghafi hutoa umbo la kilele?
swahili.i_understand_explain_in_my_own_words: Naelewa — eleza kwa maneno yangu mwenyewe
swahili.explain_how_relative_weights_produce_s: Eleza jinsi uzito linganishi unavyotoa maumbo.
swahili.design_note_discrete_4_shape_classific: Dokezo la ubunifu: uainishaji tofautitofauti wa maumbo-4; hakuna alama ya ubora wa kufaa; hakuna ufunuo — kwa makusudi.

somali.nba_average_free_throw_percentage_is_7: Celceliska boqolleyda tuujada bilaashka ah ee NBA waa ~77%
somali.nba_average_3_point_percentage_is_36: Celceliska boqolleyda saddex-dhibic ee NBA waa ~36%
somali.soccer_penalty_kick_conversion_rate_is: Heerka guusha laadadka ciqaabta ee kubadda cagta waa ~76%
somali.mlb_average_batting_average_is_250_hit: Celceliska garaaca ee MLB waa ~.250 (1 garaac 4 kasta)
somali.nfl_field_goal_success_rate_is_84: Heerka guusha goolasha garoonka ee NFL waa ~84%
somali.pro_tennis_first_serve_success_rate_is: Heerka guusha adeegga koowaad ee teniska xirfadeed waa ~62%
somali.nhl_average_shooting_percentage_is_10: Celceliska boqolleyda toogashada ee NHL waa ~10%
somali.explore_probability_through_experiment: Sahaminaya suurtagalnimada iyada oo loo marayo tijaabooyin. Socodsii tijaabooyin oo arag inta jeer ee la arkay oo ku soo dhowaanaya qiyamka la filayo.
somali.p_h_p_t_0_5_law_of_large_numbers_as_tr: P(H) = P(T) = 0.5. Sharciga tirooyinka waaweyn: marka tijaabooyinku kordhaan, saamiga madaxa wuxuu ku soo dhowaadaa 0.5. Ka dib 1,000 tuujin waxaad ku jiri doontaa ~3% gudaha 50%, laakiin taxane gaaban kasta wax kastaa wuu suurtagal yahay.
somali.dice_uniform_1_n_each_d4_d6_d8_d10_d12: Laadhuu — mid kasta sinnaan 1/N (d4 / d6 / d8 / d10 / d12 / d20)
somali.pick_any_die_size_each_face_equally_li: Dooro cabbir kasta oo laadhuu. Wajigii kasta si siman ayuu u suurtagal yahay: P = 1/N. Xisaabtu way isku mid tahay dhammaan noocyada laadhuuga — waxa is beddelaa waa hoosaadka. d4 waa 1/4, d20 waa 1/20.
somali.roll_two_dice_of_the_chosen_type_and_a: Tuuji laba laadhuu oo nooca la doortay oo isku dar. Wadartu hadda ma sinna: wadarta dhexe aad bay u caansan tahay. 2d6, P(7)=6/36, P(2)=1/36. Sababtaas awgeed ayaa Monopoly dadku ugu badan ku degaan hantida liinta — ka dib ka soo bixista xabsiga, 6, 7, 8 waa wadarta ugu caansan.
somali.equal_area_sectors_equal_probability_u: Qaybo bedka siman = suurtagalnimo siman. Qaybo aan sinnayn → soo-saaris culus. Wareejiyayaashu waa jidka ugu jilicsan ee ardayda hoose ee xagga qaybinta gooni-gooni ah.
somali.sports_weighted_real_world_odds: Ciyaaraha — fursadaha culus ee adduunka dhabta ah
somali.free_throw_75_nba_3_point_36_mlb_hit_2: Tuujada bilaashka ah 75%, saddex-dhibic NBA 36%, garaac MLB ~25%. Suurtagalnimadu had iyo jeer maaha 50/50 — xisaabtu waxay u maamushaa miisaanka aan sinnayn si la mid ah, kaliya hoosaad kala duwan.
somali.marble_bag_with_vs_without_replacement: Bac dhagax-yari — beddelaad la' iyo la-leh
somali.with_replacement_independent_draws_wit: Beddelaad la-leh: soo-saaris madax-banaan. La'aan: suurtagalnimadu way is beddeshaa soo-saaris kasta — suurtagalnimo shuruudaysan. Habka saxda ah ee ka dambeeya qaybinta hipergeometric iyo fursadaha ciyaaraha turubka.
somali.custom_design_your_own_outcome_set: Gaar — naqshadee koox natiijooyin oo aad leedahay
somali.build_any_discrete_distribution_test_t: Dhis qaybin kasta oo gooni-gooni ah. Tijaabi sharciga tirooyinka waaweyn fursado leexsan, muuji in tijaabooyin ku filan ay jeexitaanku ka jawaabi karo su'aal kasta oo qaab-xiran ah. Monte Carlo yar.
somali.multiply_along_branches_add_across_lea: Ku dhufo laamaha; ku dar caleemaha dhexdooda. Laba tuujin qadaadiic: HH HT TH TT mid kasta 0.25. Jaantusyada geedku waxay fidaan ilaa dhibaatooyinka heerka aasaasiga ah ee tijaabooyinka caafimaadka iyo aragtida Bayes.
somali.throw_darts_at_a_unit_square_count_how: Tuuji fallaadho afargees cabbir ah; tiri inta ku dhacaysa gudaha rubuc-goobeed ku qoran. π ≈ 4 × (gudaha / wadar). Ku-soo-dhowaanshuhu waa O(1/√N) — lambar kasta wuxuu ku kacaa fallaadho 100× badan.
somali.in_a_room_of_23_the_probability_of_a_s: Qol 23 qof ah, suurtagalnimada dhalasho la wadaago waa > 50%. 70 waa > 99.9%. Lid ku ah dareenka sababtoo ah waxaynu tirinnaa is-barbardhigyo (2 ka mid ah 23 = 253), ma aha dadka. Tusaalaha lidka ah ee ugu cad fasalka ee suurtagalnimada dareenka.
somali.without_replacement_each_marble_drawn_: 💡 Beddelaad la'aan: dhagax-yar kasta oo la soo saaray waa laga saaraa bacda. Suurtagalnimadu way is beddeshaa soo-saaris kasta ka dib! Bacdu way buuxsantaa marka ay madhan tahay.
somali.keyframes_mbshake_0_100_transform_rota: @keyframes mbShake { 0%,100% { transform: rotate(0deg); } 15% { transform: rotate(-8deg); } 30% { transform: rotate(8deg); } 45% { transform: rotate(-5deg); } 60% { transform: rotate(5deg); } 75% { transform: rotate(-2deg); } }
somali.define_each_event_as_a_fraction_e_g_1_: 🎯 Qeex dhacdo kasta sida jajab — tusaale, "1 jeer 20 kasta"
somali.add_colored_marbles_to_a_bag_probabili: 🎱 Ku dar dhagax-yaro midab leh bac. Suurtagalnimo = tirada dhagax-yarahaaga ÷ wadarta dhagax-yarada.
somali.drag_sliders_to_set_exact_probability_: 🎨 Jiid sliderrada si aad u dejiso boqolleyda suurtagalnimada saxda ah ee natiijo kasta.
somali.behind_one_door_a_prize_behind_two_goa: Albaab ka dambeeya: abaalmarin. Laba ka dambeeya: riyo. Dooro albaab, martigeliyuhu wuxuu furaa albaabka riyada leh, kadibna waxaad doorataa: joog mise beddel?
somali.last_20_manual_stay_plays_green_wins_d: 20-kii ugu dambeeyay ee "joog" gacanta — cagaarku wuu guuleystaa, casaanka madow wuu lumiyaa
somali.last_20_manual_switch_plays_green_wins: 20-kii ugu dambeeyay ee "beddel" gacanta — cagaarku wuu guuleystaa, casaanka madow wuu lumiyaa
somali.outcome_strips_show_your_last_20_manua: Xargaha natiijadu waxay muujiyaan 20-kii ugu dambeeyay ee ciyaaraha gacanta — cagaar = guul, casaan = lumin. Taxannaha la arko waxay kuu sheegaan sida kala-soocidda dhabta ah u dareemo.
somali.math_says_stay_wins_1_3_33_switch_wins: Xisaabtu waxay tidhaahdaa: joog wuu guuleystaa ≈ 1/3 (33%). Beddel wuu guuleystaa ≈ 2/3 (67%). Tijaabooyin ku filan, xisaabtu way guuleysataa.
somali.drop_balls_through_a_peg_grid_each_peg: Ku rid kubbadaha shabag musmaar. Musmaar kastaa wuxuu u leexiyaa 50/50 bidix ama midig. Ka dib kubbado ku filan, histogram-ku wuxuu noqdaa qalooca gambeeleha — aragtida xadka dhexe oo shaqaynaysa.
somali.drop_balls_to_see: Ku rid kubbadaha si aad u aragto…
somali.gold_dashed_line_theoretical_normal_cu: ⬆ Khadka dahabiga ah ee jajaban: qalooca caadiga ah ee aragtiyeed. Ridid badan xargahaaga tijaabada waa inay aad ugu dhegaan tan.
somali.in_a_room_of_just_23_people_there_s_a_: Qol 23 qof oo keliya ah, waxaa jira > 50% fursad in laba ay wadaagaan dhalasho. Jiid slider-ka si aad u sahamiso!
somali.run_100_simulations_of_this_room_size: Socodsii 100 jeexitaan oo cabbirkan qolka ah
somali.each_has_a_random_birthday_same_color_: 🧑 kastaa wuxuu leeyahay dhalasho random ah. Midab isku mid + dhalaal = lammaane is-le'eg. Mar kale sample si aad u aragto inta jeer ee isku-midku muuqdo.
somali.multiply_the_two_probabilities_to_get_: 💡 Ku dhufo labada suurtagalnimo si aad u hesho suurtagalnimada wadajirka ah. Dhacdooyinkani waa madax-banaan yihiin, sidaas darteed P(A∩B) = P(A) × P(B).
somali.streaks_are_normal_random_texture: Taxannuhu waa qaab-dhismeed random caadi ah
somali.observed_vs_expected_frequencies: 📊 Inta La Arkay vs Inta La Filayo
somali.as_you_run_more_trials_the_observed_ba: 💡 Markaad socodsiiso tijaabooyin badan, xargaha la arkay waa inay u soo dhowaadaan kuwa aragtiyeed — kani waa sharciga tirooyinka waaweyn oo shaqaynaya!
somali.10k_points_needed_for_2_decimal_places: ~10k dhibic ayaa loo baahan yahay 2 meelood oo tobanle ah ee π
somali.get_5_results_in_a_row_any_mode: Hel 5+ natiijo oo isku xiga (hab kasta)
somali.60_dice_rolls_all_within_10_of_expecte: 60+ tuujin laadhuu, dhammaan 10% gudaha la filayo
somali.1000_coin_trials_with_max_deviation_3: 1000 tijaabo qadaadiic oo leexasho ugu badan < 3%
somali.set_n_23_in_birthday_mode_to_see_the_p: Deji n=23 habka dhalashada si aad u aragto caqligalnimada
somali.all_outcomes_nearly_equal_in_probabili: Dhammaan natiijooyinku ku dhowaad sinnaan suurtagalnimo.
somali.middle_outcome_dominates_approaches_no: Natiijada dhexe ayaa xukunta. Baaldiyo badan waxay ku soo dhowaataa qaabka caadiga ah.
somali.one_tail_much_heavier_than_the_other_a: Dabo aad uga culus mid kale. Qaybin aan sinnayn.
somali.two_outcomes_share_roughly_equal_proba: Laba natiijo waxay wadaagaan suurtagalnimo ku dhowaad siman, saddexaad aad bay u yar tahay ama u badan.
somali.three_sliders_set_the_relative_probabi: Saddex slider waxay dejiyaan suurtagalnimooyinka isku xiran ee natiijooyinka hoose / dhexe / sare. Qaabka qaybintu wuxuu ku kala saaraa mid ka mid ah afar qaab oo gooni-gooni ah. Dhibco ma jiraan, daah-furid ma jirto — sliid oo ogow.
somali.hypothesis_free_text_what_combination_: Mala-awaal (qoraal xor ah): isku-darka noocee ayaa soo saara sinnaan? Iyo dhaladsan?
somali.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_one_watch: Hay laba slider oo deggan. Dhaqaaji mid. Daawo qaabka.
somali.find_two_settings_that_produce_the_sam: Hel laba dejin oo soo saara qaab isku mid ah.
somali.what_raw_weights_produce_a_peaked_shap: Miisaanno cayriin ah oo noocee ah ayaa soo saara qaab dhaladsan?
somali.explain_how_relative_weights_produce_s: Sharrax sida miisaanka isku xiran u soo saaro qaabab.
somali.design_note_discrete_4_shape_classific: Qoraalka naqshadeynta: kala-saaris gooni-gooni ah oo 4-qaab; dhibco-tayo-ku-haboon ma jiraan; daah-furid ma jirto — ula kac.
